Compression"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Adaptive Associative Abstraction Kernel (AAAK) is Mnemosyne's context compression algorithm. It reduces token count while preserving semantic meaning."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"The Problem"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent context windows are limited (4K–128K tokens). Raw memory dumps consume precious space. AAAK compresses related memories into concise summaries."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"How AAAK Works"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cluster"}],": Group related memories by vector similarity"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Abstract"}],": Generate a summary that captures the cluster's essence"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Associate"}],": Link the summary to original entries for drill-down"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Kernel"}],": Store as a dense \"memory kernel\" for efficient retrieval"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Compression Ratios"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Content Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Raw Tokens"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Compressed"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Ratio"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"2,000"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"200"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"10:1"}]]}],"$L7","$L8","$L9"]}]]}],"\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le"],["$Lf"],"$L10"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@11"]},null,false,"$@11"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L12",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$13",["$L14"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"X-0SVPoGwgrDsYVNqmHYH"}
